channel.title: トレイルランニング・ダイジェスト
channel.description: トレイルランニング・ダイジェストは、AIが自律的に海外のトレイルランニング情報を収集し、紹介するPodcastです。海外の大きなトレンドを掴むことを目的に構築しました。AIによるファクトチェックを二重で行っていますが、不正確な場合があります。気になる情報は、リンク先の情報ソースをご参照ください。
channel.itunes:author: Trail Podcast

item.title: 4/17 コートニーのリベンジ戦略＆足ケア予防科学＆HK4TUC完走記
item.description:
コートニー・ドウォルターのキアンティ勝利の裏側とココドナ250リベンジに向けた準備を深掘り。オルソン博士による足のケア予防科学パート2では、スラントボードやタコ管理など実践的なルーティンを紹介。香港HK4TUC298kmを完走したナタリー・ウェブスターの膝トラブル対処法と独自の栄養戦略にも迫ります。ガーミン970レビューやシューズ選びのTipsも。
【目次】 ・オープニング ・メインニュース：コートニー・ドウォルターのキアンティ勝利とココドナ250リベンジ準備 ・メインニュース：足のケア予防科学パート2 ─ オルソン博士の具体的ルーティン ・ディープダイブ：HK4TUC完走記とウルトラの栄養・メンタル戦略 ・ギア＆Tips：ガーミン970・シューズ選び・実践Tips5選 ・エンディング
【参照元】 ・Sage Canaday - #hybridathlete #ultramarathon: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PZTwm_l6sGo ・Sage Canaday - Meet and Group Shake out run with Me & HOKA at the 2026 Boston Marathon!: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bb0wui-GmwY ・iRunFar - Communities Mourn Deaths at the 2026 Marathon des Sables and on the Cape Wrath Trail: https://www.irunfar.com/deaths-2026-gregory-marathon-des-sables-legendary-david-parrish-cape-wrath-trail ・iRunFar - Understanding and Improving Hip Efficiency, Part 2: Strength: https://www.irunfar.com/understanding-and-improving-hip-efficiency-part-2-strength ・iRunFar - Ultrarunning Culture: https://www.irunfar.com/ultrarunning-culture ・iRunFar - Garmin Forerunner 970 Review: https://www.irunfar.com/garmin-forerunner-970-review ・Kilian Jornet - Bad weather in Colorado: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_1bBlQlpI2s ・La CRIPTONITA de KILIAN JORNET - Western States 100 o Sierre Zinal?: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5pYf8ItgBL8 ・Courtney Dauwalter: Chianti Pivot, Marathon Lessons + Cocodona Redemption: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OkinKf81eCQ ・The Evolution of Ultra Running: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DbfDYiMSueg ・Jim Walmsley - zrození legendy: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8h49CfB0Vw0 ・Bruce Fordyce - Ultramarathon Legend to parkrun Advocate: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iAcWKr3bKnM ・Records féminins et masculins du GR20: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1EdU48PFlE0 ・François D'Haene - 18 years since first UTMB: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=49Y8p1hN9Xs ・Gorge, Sonoma, Desert Rats + Mike Egan's 110 Mile Wheelchair Run: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-t65N6UdCIM ・Marathon terminé : mes prochaines étapes vers l'UTMB 2030: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cUmh1uMzvQg ・UTMB Essentials Episode 4: Race Day Nutrition: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cGLYHjwOPfA ・Courtney Dauwalter Wins 100-Mile Races With No Watch, No Coach, and No Plan: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_Trn_r0i89c ・I'm Not Ready For This! Training With An Olympian - Road to Leadville: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c0Y43AFFvGs ・I Tried an 18 Mile Run While Sick - Leadville 100 Prep: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ob9DEb0hA-w ・Ils choisissent mes courses avant l'UTMB: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bYOROfbvfFA ・It's never JUST about running - Desert Rats Trail Running Festival: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8ycFxmD54jo ・THE GRAND SLAM OF RUNNING: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tk94xpN3diA ・Jonathan Naboulet CCC Adaptive Team: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B5Di3v164Gw ・La otra cara de UTMB - Mi retirada en la CCC: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dHAu80NhGtc ・UTMB + BÉBÉ = Objectif 2026: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fUI_XALH0u8 ・ヤオ・ミャオの謎のウェアの正体が判明: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2X2dAKWRGoM ・Moganshan by UTMB 50K China: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G8njuGvbrDY ・Des Linden Podiums at Marathon Des Sables - Weekend Recap: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ks6AD_K1GFU ・墾丁Xtrail By UTMB 50K: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7M0SFm12Ac8 ・トレイルランナーズカップ山形2026: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SDrKu10SilM ・Ultra-Trail Essentials Episode 2: Navigating Technical Terrain: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f_BWmRGX06g ・Ultra-Trail Essentials Episode 1: Hiking & Pole Technique: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=loU8SWMQfwc ・Singletrack Podcast - Courtney Dauwalter: Chianti Pivot, Marathon Lessons + Cocodona Redemption: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OkinKf81eCQ ・The Extramilest #123: Why Most Runners Quit Too Early - Kerry Ward: https://florisgierman.libsyn.com/123-why-most-runners-quit-too-early-not-what-you-think-kerry-ward ・Freetrail Podcast - Rest Day: Gorge Storylines, Marathon des Sables & Kilian's Strava Nugget: https://thewellwithdylanbowman.libsyn.com/rest-day-gorge-storylines-marathon-des-sables-calamorro-skyrace-recap-kilians-strava-nugget ・Trail Story Podcast - Traverser les Pyrénées par le GR 10: https://podcast.ausha.co/trail-story/165 ・HK Trail Running - Episode 63: Natalie Webster: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/trahk/episodes/Episode-63---Natalie-Webster-e3fj6mm ・Trail Runner Nation EP 776: Build Stronger Feet Before They Fail: https://trailrunnernation.libsyn.com/ep-776-build-stronger-feet-before-they-fail ・Some Work All Play #306: How the GOAT Fuels, Single v. Double Workouts: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/someworkallplay/episodes/306--How-the-GOAT-Fuels--Single-v--Double-Workouts--Heat-and-Altitude-Study--Caffeine-Genotypes--and-Building-Bone-Density-e3ht27b ・Choose Strong #138: Rattlesnakes & Gear Reviews: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/sallymcraepodcast/episodes/138--Rattlesnakes--Gear-Reviews-e3h88q9 ・Ultra Running Magazine - Kat Edwards Anderson: https://ultrarunningmag.libsyn.com/kat-edwards-anderson ・One More K - Will Trail Running Evolve Into Triathlonification?: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/markus-gnirck9/episodes/Will-Trail-Running-Evolve-Into-a-Triathlonification-or-Die-Technical-Racers-e3ecikc
#トレイルランニング #ウルトラマラソン #コートニードウォルター #ココドナ250 #足のケア #ガーミン #HK4TUC #栄養戦略 #メンタル #ギアレビュー
item.itunes:title: 4/17 コートニーのリベンジ戦略＆足ケア予防科学＆HK4TUC完走記
item.itunes:summary:
コートニー・ドウォルターのキアンティ勝利の裏側とココドナ250リベンジに向けた準備を深掘り。オルソン博士による足のケア予防科学パート2では、スラントボードやタコ管理など実践的なルーティンを紹介。香港HK4TUC298kmを完走したナタリー・ウェブスターの膝トラブル対処法と独自の栄養戦略にも迫ります。ガーミン970レビューやシューズ選びのTipsも。
【目次】 ・オープニング ・メインニュース：コートニー・ドウォルターのキアンティ勝利とココドナ250リベンジ準備 ・メインニュース：足のケア予防科学パート2 ─ オルソン博士の具体的ルーティン ・ディープダイブ：HK4TUC完走記とウルトラの栄養・メンタル戦略 ・ギア＆Tips：ガーミン970・シューズ選び・実践Tips5選 ・エンディング
【参照元】 ・Sage Canaday - #hybridathlete #ultramarathon: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PZTwm_l6sGo ・Sage Canaday - Meet and Group Shake out run with Me & HOKA at the 2026 Boston Marathon!: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bb0wui-GmwY ・iRunFar - Communities Mourn Deaths at the 2026 Marathon des Sables and on the Cape Wrath Trail: https://www.irunfar.com/deaths-2026-gregory-marathon-des-sables-legendary-david-parrish-cape-wrath-trail ・iRunFar - Understanding and Improving Hip Efficiency, Part 2: Strength: https://www.irunfar.com/understanding-and-improving-hip-efficiency-part-2-strength ・iRunFar - Ultrarunning Culture: https://www.irunfar.com/ultrarunning-culture ・iRunFar - Garmin Forerunner 970 Review: https://www.irunfar.com/garmin-forerunner-970-review ・Kilian Jornet - Bad weather in Colorado: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_1bBlQlpI2s ・La CRIPTONITA de KILIAN JORNET - Western States 100 o Sierre Zinal?: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5pYf8ItgBL8 ・Courtney Dauwalter: Chianti Pivot, Marathon Lessons + Cocodona Redemption: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OkinKf81eCQ ・The Evolution of Ultra Running: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DbfDYiMSueg ・Jim Walmsley - zrození legendy: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8h49CfB0Vw0 ・Bruce Fordyce - Ultramarathon Legend to parkrun Advocate: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iAcWKr3bKnM ・Records féminins et masculins du GR20: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1EdU48PFlE0 ・François D'Haene - 18 years since first UTMB: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=49Y8p1hN9Xs ・Gorge, Sonoma, Desert Rats + Mike Egan's 110 Mile Wheelchair Run: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-t65N6UdCIM ・Marathon terminé : mes prochaines étapes vers l'UTMB 2030: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cUmh1uMzvQg ・UTMB Essentials Episode 4: Race Day Nutrition: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cGLYHjwOPfA ・Courtney Dauwalter Wins 100-Mile Races With No Watch, No Coach, and No Plan: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_Trn_r0i89c ・I'm Not Ready For This! Training With An Olympian - Road to Leadville: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c0Y43AFFvGs ・I Tried an 18 Mile Run While Sick - Leadville 100 Prep: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ob9DEb0hA-w ・Ils choisissent mes courses avant l'UTMB: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bYOROfbvfFA ・It's never JUST about running - Desert Rats Trail Running Festival: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8ycFxmD54jo ・THE GRAND SLAM OF RUNNING: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tk94xpN3diA ・Jonathan Naboulet CCC Adaptive Team: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B5Di3v164Gw ・La otra cara de UTMB - Mi retirada en la CCC: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dHAu80NhGtc ・UTMB + BÉBÉ = Objectif 2026: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fUI_XALH0u8 ・ヤオ・ミャオの謎のウェアの正体が判明: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2X2dAKWRGoM ・Moganshan by UTMB 50K China: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G8njuGvbrDY ・Des Linden Podiums at Marathon Des Sables - Weekend Recap: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ks6AD_K1GFU ・墾丁Xtrail By UTMB 50K: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7M0SFm12Ac8 ・トレイルランナーズカップ山形2026: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SDrKu10SilM ・Ultra-Trail Essentials Episode 2: Navigating Technical Terrain: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f_BWmRGX06g ・Ultra-Trail Essentials Episode 1: Hiking & Pole Technique: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=loU8SWMQfwc ・Singletrack Podcast - Courtney Dauwalter: Chianti Pivot, Marathon Lessons + Cocodona Redemption: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OkinKf81eCQ ・The Extramilest #123: Why Most Runners Quit Too Early - Kerry Ward: https://florisgierman.libsyn.com/123-why-most-runners-quit-too-early-not-what-you-think-kerry-ward ・Freetrail Podcast - Rest Day: Gorge Storylines, Marathon des Sables & Kilian's Strava Nugget: https://thewellwithdylanbowman.libsyn.com/rest-day-gorge-storylines-marathon-des-sables-calamorro-skyrace-recap-kilians-strava-nugget ・Trail Story Podcast - Traverser les Pyrénées par le GR 10: https://podcast.ausha.co/trail-story/165 ・HK Trail Running - Episode 63: Natalie Webster: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/trahk/episodes/Episode-63---Natalie-Webster-e3fj6mm ・Trail Runner Nation EP 776: Build Stronger Feet Before They Fail: https://trailrunnernation.libsyn.com/ep-776-build-stronger-feet-before-they-fail ・Some Work All Play #306: How the GOAT Fuels, Single v. Double Workouts: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/someworkallplay/episodes/306--How-the-GOAT-Fuels--Single-v--Double-Workouts--Heat-and-Altitude-Study--Caffeine-Genotypes--and-Building-Bone-Density-e3ht27b ・Choose Strong #138: Rattlesnakes & Gear Reviews: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/sallymcraepodcast/episodes/138--Rattlesnakes--Gear-Reviews-e3h88q9 ・Ultra Running Magazine - Kat Edwards Anderson: https://ultrarunningmag.libsyn.com/kat-edwards-anderson ・One More K - Will Trail Running Evolve Into Triathlonification?: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/markus-gnirck9/episodes/Will-Trail-Running-Evolve-Into-a-Triathlonification-or-Die-Technical-Racers-e3ecikc
